market_pulse: Strong Memorial Day weekend momentum carrying into June with major DJ talent commitments across all premium venues; LIV Beach leading social engagement with Linska, David Guetta, and Sidepiece back-to-back.

content_gaps.description: Tech-house and progressive house audio trends dominating competitor stories (Zouk 'THE PIT' series, Encore tech-house); LIV Beach focused on mainstream EDM.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Feature emerging tech-house remix packs in LIV Beach stories; test audience response with progressive builds on Reels.

content_gaps.description: Competitor narrative includes promoter spotlights and setup content; LIV focused on finished event visuals only.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch weekly 'Setup Stories' showing bartender skills, sound check, VIP cabana prep to humanize brand.

content_gaps.description: XS and Zouk hosting UGC contests in comments; Hakkasan leveraging fan outfit posts. LIV not actively requesting customer content reposts.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch #LIVBeachFit hashtag campaign; repost top 3 customer stories daily on main feed.

influencer_activity.mention: XS/Encore promoter with 180K followers posting weekly event previews and VIP cabana content; drives consistent traffic to competitor venues.
TAO Beach and OMNIA specialist with strong EDC Week coverage; recently featured Tiësto at TAO Beach and OMNIA nightclub events.
Exclusive 2026 bi-coastal residency includes LIV Beach May 30 appearance; major talent anchor for weekend.
